body_composition.notes: Baseline body scan at start of fast. Visceral fat 5x target.

measurements.notes: First morning of fast. Excellent sleep and readiness.
Likely entering ketosis. Sleep efficiency lower.

log.message: Excellent sleep score (84) and readiness (83). Body still running on glycogen.
Big weight drop (-2kg) as glycogen depletes. Sleep and readiness dipped - ketosis transition.
Body composition scan completed. Visceral fat at 5.18 lbs (5x target).

1.expect: Hunger peaks, possible headache. Body using stored glucose. Weight drops from water/glycogen.
1.tips: Stay hydrated. Electrolytes help. Keep busy.

2.expect: Hunger subsides. May feel fatigue, brain fog as ketosis begins. Sleep may be disrupted.
2.tips: Rest if needed. Light activity ok. Salt helps.

3.expect: Body switching to fat. Energy may fluctuate. Mental clarity often improves.

4.expect: Hunger largely gone. Steady energy. Sleep normalizing.
4.tips: Autophagy ramping up. Great time for light walking.

5.expect: Halfway point. Mental clarity high. Fat adaptation improving.
5.tips: Body efficient at burning fat now.

6.expect: Cellular cleanup in full swing. Stable energy and mood.

7.expect: Body running smoothly on ketones. May feel surprisingly good.
7.tips: Don't break fast impulsively - you've come far.

8.expect: Continued cellular repair. Weight loss rate may slow.

9.expect: Almost there. Body very efficient now.

10.expect: Final day. Schedule body scan. Prepare for gentle refeed.
10.tips: Break with bone broth or light soup. No heavy foods.
